messages.content: Open Chrome and in Chrome search ChatGPT.

Opening Chrome. But I could not finish the second step: I can open or close apps, create or delete files and folders in the workspace, type text, press keys, use hotkeys, and move or click the mouse when asked explicitly.

In Chrome, searching for ChatGPT. The Chrome extension integrates with search engines to provide answers from the GPT-3.5 model by offering instant responses from ChatGPT, showing answers alongside search results from Google, Bing, etc.
